debug_info.goal: ⊢ ∀ (s : ℕ → Set ℝ), Pairwise (Function.onFun Disjoint s) → sorry (⋃ i, s i) ≤ ∑' (i : ℕ), sorry (s i)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
s hs
    by_cases h : (π ∈ ⋃ i, s i)
    · have : ∃ i, π ∈ s i := by
        simpa [mem_iUnion] using h
      rcases this with ⟨i, hi⟩
      have hsum : (∑' i : ℕ, (if π ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) = 1 := by
        have huniq : ∀ j, j ≠ i → π ∉ s j := by
          intro j hj
          have : Disjoint (s i) (s j) := hs (by simpa [Function.onFun] using hj.symm)
          exact fun hπj => (this.le_bot ⟨hi, hπj⟩).elim
        have hzero : (∑' j : ℕ, (if π ∈ s j then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0))
            = (if π ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0) := by
          have : (∀ j, j ≠ i → (if π ∈ s j then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0) = 0) := by
            intro j hj
            have : π ∉ s j := huniq j hj
            simp [this]
          simpa [tsum_eq_single i this]
        simpa [hzero, hi]
      simpa [μD, h, hsum] using le_of_eq rfl
    · have h' : ∀ i, π ∉ s i := by
        intro i hi
        apply h
        exact mem_iUnion.2 ⟨i, hi⟩
      have : ∀ i, (if π ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0) = 0 := by
        intro i; simp [h' i]
      have hsum : (∑' i : ℕ, (if π ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) = 0 := by
        simpa [this]
      simpa [μD, h, hsum] using le_of_eq rfl
